enriched_points.expanded_content: Effective thermal management is essential in WBG devices to mitigate heat generation, ensuring optimal performance and longevity through techniques like advanced cooling systems and material innovations.

Optimizing electrical performance in WBG devices involves refining material properties and device architecture to enhance efficiency, reduce losses, and maximize operational capabilities in demanding applications.
Reliability in WBG devices is influenced by thermal stability, material integrity, and environmental resilience, which are critical for maintaining performance under various operational conditions.
